title: Plan, conduct and report a workplace incident investigation
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan, conduct and report a workplace incident investigation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Carry out initial responses to the incident

pcs.text: Access, interpret and implement workplace procedures for incident response and investigation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access, interpret and implement workplace procedures for incident response and investigation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access, interpret and implement workplace procedures for incident response and investigation.

pcs.text: Determine regulatory and workplace requirements that relate to the incident, and ensure investigation activities and documentation are compliant
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine regulatory and workplace requirements that relate to the incident, and ensure investigation activities and documentation are compliant?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine regulatory and workplace requirements that relate to the incident, and ensure investigation activities and documentation are compliant.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Carry out initial responses to the incident

elements.title: Develop an investigation plan

pcs.text: Apply knowledge of applicable legislation and workplace policies, procedures and systems to ensure requirements of legislation and workplace policies, procedures, processes and systems are met by the investigation plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply knowledge of applicable legislation and workplace policies, procedures and systems to ensure requirements of legislation and workplace policies, procedures, processes and systems are met by the investigation plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply knowledge of applicable legislation and workplace policies, procedures and systems to ensure requirements of legislation and workplace policies, procedures, processes and systems are met by the investigation plan.

pcs.text: Consult with relevant individuals to determine appropriate processes for the investigation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with relevant individuals to determine appropriate processes for the investigation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with relevant individuals to determine appropriate processes for the investigation.

pcs.text: Define the scope and timeframes of the investigation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define the scope and timeframes of the investigation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define the scope and timeframes of the investigation.

pcs.text: Ensure participation of, and consultation with, relevant individuals and parties as part of the planning process, specifying agreed processes for all phases of the investigation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure participation of, and consultation with, relevant individuals and parties as part of the planning process, specifying agreed processes for all phases of the investigation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure participation of, and consultation with, relevant individuals and parties as part of the planning process, specifying agreed processes for all phases of the investigation.

pcs.text: Identify, document and obtain necessary resources to conduct the investigation, including expert advice if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, document and obtain necessary resources to conduct the investigation, including expert advice if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, document and obtain necessary resources to conduct the investigation, including expert advice if required.

pcs.text: Identify, address and document barriers to investigation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, address and document barriers to investigation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, address and document barriers to investigation.

pcs.text: Ensure planning includes agreed timelines, objectives, responsibilities, roles, documentation, actions and outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure planning includes agreed timelines, objectives, responsibilities, roles, documentation, actions and outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure planning includes agreed timelines, objectives, responsibilities, roles, documentation, actions and outcomes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop an investigation plan

elements.title: Conduct the investigation

pcs.text: Identify and access sources of information and data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and access sources of information and data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and access sources of information and data.

pcs.text: Inspect relevant evidence, and document outcome of inspection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect relevant evidence, and document outcome of inspection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect relevant evidence, and document outcome of inspection.

pcs.text: Gather information and data in ways that ensure objectivity, confidentiality, validity and accuracy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Gather information and data in ways that ensure objectivity, confidentiality, validity and accuracy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Gather information and data in ways that ensure objectivity, confidentiality, validity and accuracy.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Conduct the investigation

elements.title: Evaluate information and develop corrective actions

pcs.text: Determine root cause, key events, conditions and/or circumstances that together resulted in the incident
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine root cause, key events, conditions and/or circumstances that together resulted in the incident?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine root cause, key events, conditions and/or circumstances that together resulted in the incident.

pcs.text: Develop actions, interventions and practical measures to prevent the reoccurrence of the incident and to address root causes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop actions, interventions and practical measures to prevent the reoccurrence of the incident and to address root causes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop actions, interventions and practical measures to prevent the reoccurrence of the incident and to address root causes.

pcs.text: Detail recommended actions, interventions or measures, and plans for their implementation and evaluation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Detail recommended actions, interventions or measures, and plans for their implementation and evaluation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Detail recommended actions, interventions or measures, and plans for their implementation and evaluation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Evaluate information and develop corrective actions

elements.title: Compile and communicate investigation report

pcs.text: Prepare a report on the investigation, using objective language
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare a report on the investigation, using objective language?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a report on the investigation, using objective language.

pcs.text: Cite evidence and basis for conclusions and recommendations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Cite evidence and basis for conclusions and recommendations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Cite evidence and basis for conclusions and recommendations.

pcs.text: Communicate the report to relevant individuals and parties
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate the report to relevant individuals and parties?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate the report to relevant individuals and parties.

pcs.text: Review the investigation process and provide feedback
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review the investigation process and provide feedback?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review the investigation process and provide feedback.

pcs.text: File and store report according to workplace systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can File and store report according to workplace systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can File and store report according to workplace systems.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Compile and communicate investigation report

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
